project.name: AEM Groovy Console - Migration
project.description: Deployment migration extension for the AEM Groovy Console, replacing the deprecated AEM Easy Content Upgrade (AECU) project. Groovy migration scripts deployed below /conf/groovyconsole/scripts/migration execute with checksum-based run-once semantics, in deterministic path order with fail-fast behavior. Deployed as a separate content package on top of the Groovy Console.
